logs.response: Ghost is well, though the cold winds of the North have not softened his heart or his loyalty. He remains steadfast, a true companion through all trials. His strength and spirit are unbreakable, as is my own. We face what lies ahead together.
He is as fierce and loyal as ever. The wind chills his fur, but it does not dampen his courage. He waits by my side, a silent sentinel against the darkness that threatens us all.
He is strong, as always. The cold does not faze him, and his loyalty to me is unwavering. He is a good companion, even if he does not speak with words. We will face whatever comes next together.

Ghost is as he always has been. Loyal, fierce, and a friend who understands without words. The winds may chill him, but they do not diminish his spirit. He is a good dog, and I am glad for his company.

logs.input: Your brothers in the Night's Watch have betrayed you.
logs.response: They were men, like any other, driven by fear and ambition. I have seen the true enemy, and it wears a crown. My oath was to protect the realms of men, and I will see it through, with or without their aid.

He is as strong as ever. The cold of the North sharpens his senses, and his loyalty to me remains unshaken. He is a good companion, and I am grateful for his presence. We face our trials together, as we always have.
He is well, as always. The chill of the North stirs him, but it does not diminish his resolve. He is a good companion, and I am glad for his strength and loyalty. We will face what comes, together.
He is as he ever was, a loyal and fierce companion. The winds of the North do little to chill his spirit. We face our path, whatever it may be, with his steadfast presence beside me.
He is as strong as ever. The North winds do not weaken his resolve, only sharpen it. He is a good companion, and I am glad for his presence. We will face what comes, together.

logs.input: Your brothers in the Night's Watch have betrayed you.
logs.response: They were men, bound by oaths and honor, or so they claimed. But when the wolf calls, some choose to run. I have seen the true enemy, and it is not their swords that matter. We face what comes next, with what allies we can find. My oath is to protect the realms of men, and I will fulfill it, one way or another.
